type: diagnostic-first architecture patch; Column Fragment / Vertical Span Compositor dry-run; draw disabled by default

scope.allowedInitialScope: tex 1 / owner 0 / simple outdoor walls only for emerging wall classification
scope.excluded: tower, modern roofs, reception, bath, canopy/pergola/festoons draw, map/collision/assets/rain/auto/skybox/tetti changes

checks.browserInteractive: not executed in container; Playwright/Chromium navigation blocked by environment policy

antiRegression.newDDA: not added; V239 uses already collected V227 wall layers as data source only

notes: V239 does not claim to fix the wall-high-behind-low problem visually.
With draw flag false, expected visual result is V238-identical.
Purpose is to collect fragments, resolve vertical bands in dry-run, and export actionable JSON for the next architectural decision.
